name: MPX NJ — Deal of the Night

theme.description: Atlantic City midnight luxury. Deep black environment with gold accents inspired by MPX NJ's dark and gold brand aesthetic. Products receive a dramatic solo spotlight cinematic treatment. Discount price drops like a casino jackpot.
theme.mood: cinematic, luxury, Atlantic City night, casino, premium, dark, gold

capabilities.discount_highlight_style: slot-machine-drop with gold glow + savings badge

key_moments: 0.0s — Scene frame establishes (corner brackets, rule lines, MPX wordmark)
3.2s — Price drop: original crossed out, sale price jackpot reveal
3.8s — Gold scan sweep / X transition element crosses frame
4.0s — Savings badge shoots in with shimmer
4.8s — Living moment: float, glow pulse, spotlight breathe
13.0s — Exit sweep, all elements retract, scene resets

brand.name: MPX NJ
brand.creative_concept: The House Always Wins — each product gets its moment under the spotlight, the discount lands like a jackpot. The MPX X mark lives as diagonal light fractures through the scene.

technical.performance: optimized — grain via canvas RAF, no CSS filters on main loop
